title: Transformers Architecture IR — ArchitectureTemplate v0
description: Compact, architecture-specific, config-parametric artifact serialized once per model_type. See SPEC.md for the full contract.

model_type.description: Transformers model_type this template describes; one template per model_type.

architecture.description: Normalized model-level semantic facts derived from config + module tree (generic, no per-model special-casing). Fields that don't apply are omitted.

view.description: High-level layout: decoder | encoder | enc_dec | multimodal.

family.description: Task family via Auto* mappings: causal_lm | masked_lm | seq2seq | image_classification | ...

capabilities.description: Implementation-agnostic facts about what the architecture can do / run with (distinct from `architecture`, which is what it is).

attention_backends.description: Attention implementations the model supports (eager | sdpa | flash_attention | flex_attention). 'Can run with', not 'installed here'.

attention_patterns.description: Distinct per-layer attention pattern kinds (causal | bidirectional | sliding | chunked | compressed).

attention_schedule.description: Raw per-layer config.layer_types schedule, or null for a uniform model.

task_heads.description: Task families available for this model_type across the Auto* mappings (causal_lm, sequence_classification, …).

tensor_parallel.description: Whether the model ships a base tensor-parallel plan (per-projection colwise/rowwise on the projection nodes).

kernels.description: Kernelizable layers present in the model (from @use_kernel_forward_from_hub) -> compatible Hub kernel repo ids. Nodes reference these by name via attributes.kernel. Empty repo list = kernel-swap-ready but no Hub repo registered.

referenced_fields.description: Config knobs the artifact is parameterized by — the fields referenced by config expressions (e.g. repeat count_expr) — with their default values observed at generation time. The full config is intentionally NOT serialized.

salient_fields.description: Curated whitelist of architecture-defining scalar config defaults (dims, heads, activation, …). Provenance/convenience, not the full config.

components.description: Semantic components reachable outside of any symbolic repeat body.

templates.description: Reusable component templates, i.e. the bodies referenced by symbolic repeats. Serialized once, never per instance.

repeats.description: Symbolic repeats collapsing homogeneous repeated blocks. A repeat is NOT expanded into one entry per instance.

edges.description: Coarse semantic dataflow edges between semantic IDs.

dataflow.description: Optional: tensor shapes observed from a real forward on the meta model, config-parametric (symbolized). Absent when the forward cannot run on meta. Node ORDER is not repeated here — it lives in `edges`.

source.description: How the flow was obtained, e.g. 'observed_forward_meta'.

shapes.description: Map of semantic component id -> {in, out} observed tensor shapes (symbolized). Join to nodes by id.

provenance.description: Which config/model classes this IR was introspected from: {config_class, config_module, model_class, model_module}. Provenance, not semantic identity.

warnings.description: Optional non-fatal generation warnings; omitted when empty.

extends.description: The dominant parent model_type this architecture inherits from via its modular_<name>.py, or null for standalone models. (The diff_size modularity metric lives in modular_graph.json, not here.)

patches.description: Per-class modular change sets projected onto semantic component kinds. Omitted for standalone models and excludes trivial (inherit-everything) classes.

sym_shape.description: A symbolized tensor shape: each dim is either an integer or a token string ('B', 'S', or a config expression like 'config.hidden_size').

target_class.description: Provenance: the modular Python class this change belongs to.

component_kind.description: Semantic component kind this class maps to (e.g. attention, feed_forward), or null if unknown.

parent_model.description: Only present when not the dominant `extends` parent (multi-parent case).

kind.description: Semantic role (e.g. embedding, attention, feed_forward, normalization, transformer_block, position).

path_pattern.description: Provenance: symbolic module path with {i} placeholders (e.g. 'model.layers.{i}.self_attn').

children.description: Semantic IDs of child components. Omitted for leaf nodes (treat absence as no children).

attributes.description: Optional normalized semantic facts for this component (e.g. attention variant/heads, norm_type, MoE experts).

id.description: Stable semantic ID for the repeat (e.g. 'decoder_layers').

body.description: Semantic ID of the template body that is repeated.

count_expr.description: Config expression string giving the repeat count (e.g. 'config.num_hidden_layers'). NOT Python code to exec; a restricted arithmetic DSL over config.<field> references.

count_source.description: Whether count_expr resolves against config or was a literal observed in the module tree.

count.description: Optional: count observed under the default config at generation time (provenance/default). The evaluated count lives in the ResolvedGraph.

index_symbol.description: Symbol used for the repeat index in path_pattern (e.g. 'i').

container_path_pattern.description: Provenance: symbolic path of the repeat container.

item_path_pattern.description: Provenance: symbolic path of a single item (e.g. 'model.layers.{i}').

repeated_class_name.description: Provenance: originating Python class of the repeated block.

source.description: Semantic ID of the edge source, or an 'input:<name>' pseudo-node.

target.description: Semantic ID of the edge target, or an 'input:<name>' pseudo-node.
